title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 25 2024

section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 25 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 25/07/2024
DCE iron ore futures continued to fall today %. an decrease of 1.55% throughout the day; sometraders were negative to sell, Some steel purchased on demand. PBF at Shandong port dealt 765 yuan/mt; decreased 10-15 yuan/mt over yesterday.
